_comment: Phase 3B curated overlay - leadership and sites from official portals where possible. US governors and inauguration dates cross-checked against Ballotpedia current governors list. US population omitted (Census PEP in enrich). Non-US population omitted pending StatCan/ABS/ONS pulls. UK England regions (UK-ENG-*) not filled yet. _sources is documentation-only.

CA-BC._sources: Premier David Eby — gov.bc.ca office of the premier (May 2026).

CA-MB._sources: Premier Wab Kinew sworn Oct 2023 — gov.mb.ca premier (May 2026).

CA-NB._sources: Premier Susan Holt sworn Nov 2 2024 — gnb.ca office of the premier / CBC (May 2026).

CA-NL.leader_party: Liberal Party of Newfoundland and Labrador

CA-NS.leader_party: Progressive Conservative Association of Nova Scotia

CA-NT._sources: Premier R.J. Simpson — Northwest Territories consensus government; gov.nt.ca / ntassembly.ca (May 2026). No partisan affiliation.

CA-NU._sources: Premier John Main — sworn 2025-11-20; Leadership Forum 2025-11-18 (premier.gov.nu.ca About the Premier). Consensus government; no partisan affiliation.

CA-PE.leader_party: Progressive Conservative Party of Prince Edward Island

AU-QLD._sources: Premier David Crisafulli — Queensland Government / ABC News (Nov 2024 change of government).

AU-ACT._sources: Chief Minister Andrew Barr — ACT Government (May 2026).

AU-NT._sources: Chief Minister Lia Finocchiaro — NT Government; sworn Aug 2024 post-election — ABC News / nt.gov.au (May 2026).

UK-NIR._sources: First Minister Michelle O'Neill — Northern Ireland Executive / NI Assembly (Stormont restoration Feb 2024).

UK-ENG._sources: Prime Minister of the UK (England uses Westminster government) — gov.uk / parliament.uk (May 2026).

CA-ON._sources: Premier Doug Ford — Ontario Premier office / Legislative Assembly of Ontario (May 2026).

UK-SCT._sources: First Minister John Swinney sworn 2024-05-08 — gov.scot (May 2026).

UK-WLS._sources: First Minister Eluned Morgan sworn 2024-08-06 — GOV.WALES (May 2026).
